items.title: Ten More Things You Can Do With Pulumi Neo
items.description: Ten more platform-engineering workflows you can hand to Pulumi Neo: deployments, tickets, incident triage, IAM, migration, and continuous ops.

items.title: CDKTF is deprecated: What's next for your team?
items.description: The deprecation of CDKTF has left many without a clear path forward. This post presents the alternatives and shows what it's like to move from CDKTF to Pulumi.

items.title: AWS built an integrated AI Agent training pipeline and they want you to rent it
items.description: At re:Invent 2025, AWS revealed a vertically integrated AI training pipeline. Here's who it's actually for.

items.title: How to Implement Robust Security Guardrails Using Policy as Code
items.description: Implement deployment guardrails with Pulumi CrossGuard to create safe self-service infrastructure balancing developer autonomy and control.

items.title: Governance as an Enabler: Scaling Safely and Confidently
items.description: Transform governance from manual bureaucracy into an automated enabler by embedding policy-as-code, RBAC, and automated controls directly into your platform.

items.title: Observability as a Developer Superpower
items.description: Transform observability into a developer superpower with unified visibility, AI-powered insights, and actionable alerts embedded in your platform.

items.title: From Configuration Chaos to Programming Languages
items.description: Learn how to transform infrastructure management from configuration chaos to programming languages using effective change management strategies.

items.title: Platform Engineering Buffet at SEITENBAU
items.description: How SEITENBAU built a flexible platform serving 20+ independent projects with Pulumi's buffet approach, offering reusable components teams can mix and match.

items.title: Platform Engineering: Evolution or Rebranding?
items.description: Is platform engineering a genuine evolution of DevOps or just a rebrand? We explore both perspectives on this industry trend.

items.title: Security as an Enabler: Building Trust into Your Platform
items.description: Learn how security can enable innovation by embedding guardrails directly into your platform.

items.title: Improve Developer Experience: Increase Dev Productivity with Internal Developer Platforms
items.description: Learn how to boost developer experience, productivity, and velocity with an internal developer platform using service catalogs, templates, and CI/CD.

items.title: Self-Service Infrastructure: From Tickets to Tools
items.description: Unlock developer productivity with self-service infrastructure through modular abstraction and intent-based specifications for your internal developer platform.

items.title: Provisioning: From Chaos to Control
items.description: Build a reliable infrastructure provisioning foundation with version control, automation, and golden-path templates for your internal developer platform.

items.title: Platform Pillars: Build Platforms, Not Infrastructure
items.description: Explore the essential pillars of Platform Engineering and learn how to transform infrastructure chaos into a streamlined development experience.

items.title: Host your Python app for $1.12 a month
items.description: How cheap can you host a Python API in 2026? Package Flask as a container, deploy to AWS Lambda with Pulumi, and pay ~$1.12/month worst-case ($0 when idle).

items.title: Top 15 Python Tools for DevOps
items.description: From quick fixes to scalable enterprise solutions—explore 15 essential Python tools for automation, monitoring, and cloud deployment.

items.title: AI Engineering Lessons from Building Pulumi Copilot
items.description: Learn key engineering lessons from building Pulumi Copilot, including how to minimize LLM workload, validate outputs, and deal with hallucination.

items.title: 105 Ways to Run Containers: The Cloud Container Iceberg
items.description: Explore 105+ ways to run containers—from AWS to toasters to quantum computers. Discover unique OCI deployment options beyond Kubernetes and Docker.

items.title: Pulumi + uv: Fast Python Package and Project Management
items.description: Learn how to use uv, an ultra-fast Python package manager, now fully integrated with Pulumi

items.title: Fargate vs EC2
items.description: Explore the differences between AWS EKS Fargate and EC2-backed clusters for your Kubernetes EKS workloads.

items.title: When to Use Cosmos DB
items.description: Discover when to use Cosmos DB and how it compares with PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Cassandra, and DynamoDB. Learn about scalability, performance, cost & use cases.
